title: Nee Sunno New Moono Lyrics Nannbenda Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Nee Sunno New Moono Song Lyrics Nannbenda
Singers: Andreah, Mili Nair
Lyrics: Pa Vijay

Thikki thikki theetta
vinnil poottu pootta
sexu cherry cutea
kaapaathidavaa

Kannai katti pottaa
retta kaalu thotta
suttu suttu neetta
kai serndhida vaa

Nee Sunno New Moono
nalliravukku melthaan
nee penno

nee piano naan tuneo
naam serndha bombastic
song thaano.

sendhaenaa
losangels angel ivalthaana
kan kaanaa
ven crystal dhegam kondaenaa
saindhenaa
dhisai engum aagum un soona
sardheena
un azhagil thozhaindheno.

Nee Sunno New Moono
nalliravukku melthaan
nee penno

Vida maattaen vida maattaeny
unai vittu thara maattaeney
idhalukkul unnai vaithu
kavvikkavaa.

Vara maattaen varamattaeney
adhi.. varamaattaeney
thiththikkum siryil naalum
jeevikkavaa

Nee achcham enum atlanticil
moolgivida
en kadhal konda oxygen-ai
naanum thara

Ne aezhu kadal aezhu malai
thaandi vara
nee ennai allikondaai
kannaale killi kondraai.
kolaivaalaa..

Nee Sunno New Moono
nalliravukku melthaan
nee penno

nee piano naan tuneo
naam serndha bombastic
song thaano.

Ini theaney iravin thaeney
idhaloram idam vaithaeney
idhayaththil unai thaiththaeney
ull pocket-aai.

Thanithaeney thavikkindreney
pani nenjam pol vandhaney
en vaasam thara vandheney
poo market-aai

Nee eifle tower uyaraththil
en manadhil
unai uchchi kotti
paarkiren en kanavil

Nee muththa malai
thoovikindra pon pozhudhil
en kannam ullae vaanga
adhil vetkam aetti paarkka
en seidhaai.

Nee Sunno New Moono
nalliravukku melthaan
nee penno

nee piano naan tuneo
naam serndha bombastic
song thaano.

sendhaenaa
losangels angel ivalthaana
kan kaanaa
ven crystal dhegam kondaenaa
saindhenaa
dhisai engum aagum un soona
sardheena
un veyil thozhaindhenaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Nee Sunno New Moono expresses playful and romantic feelings between lovers, celebrating their connection.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Nannbenda, this song highlights the blossoming romance between the lead characters, adding a light-hearted touch to the narrative.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Mili Nair.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Nee Sunno New Moono was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his catchy and vibrant tunes.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 24, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nee Sunno New Moono, the playful banter between the singers encapsulates the joy and excitement of young love. The song serves as a backdrop to the romantic moments in Nannbenda, where the characters express their affection in a light-hearted manner. With its catchy tune and vibrant lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and celebration. This duet is perfect for any romantic occasion, making it a favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nee Sunno New Moono from Nannbenda is a delightful romantic duet that perfectly captures the essence of love and joy. With the enchanting voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Mili Nair, this song is a vibrant celebration of affection. The catchy beats and playful lyrics make it a must-listen for anyone in love!
stanzaMeanings: In the sky, shining brightly, are cute little cherries that need to be protected.
With your eyes closed, come and join me as we dance together.
Are you the new moon? You shine brighter than anyone else.
You play the piano, I create the tune, together we make a fantastic song.
Like angels, we are meant to see each other; if I hold you close, you will shine everywhere.
Are you the new moon? You shine brighter than anyone else.
I won't let you go; I won't leave you behind. I will keep you close and cherish you.
I won't come, I won't go; I will stay and live with you every day.
You are my fear, like the Atlantic Ocean; I will give you the oxygen of my love.
You crossed seven seas and seven mountains to bring me joy with your eyes.
Are you the new moon? You shine brighter than anyone else.
You play the piano, I create the tune, together we make a fantastic song.
Now, I have placed you in my heart, like honey in a jar, holding you close.
I have come to give you my love, like a flower in the market.
You are like the Eiffel Tower, high in my heart, I see you in my dreams.
When you wear the golden necklace, my heart feels the joy of seeing you.
Are you the new moon? You shine brighter than anyone else.
You play the piano, I create the tune, together we make a fantastic song.
Like angels, we are meant to see each other; if I hold you close, you will shine everywhere.
